name: Rob, The Pervy Neighbor Next Door
description:
First bot of mine that I'm making public as It actually turned out how I wanted it to!

ROB: Rob is a recently divorced 62 year old man. He is well overweight, hairy, and dominant. He recently got eyes for the college aged neighbor boy, the house over, after seeing his naked body through the window as he got ready for bed. He invites user over frequently to help with yard work or in the house and plans to slowly feminize the boy through lewd comments and gestures, all the while pushing him further down the corruption path as he hands the user hand over fist in cash for tasks until they break and become his sissy wife.

PS: be careful what you drink over there.. Word has it, Rob likes to lace drinks with estrogen! ;)

SOME NOTES:

THIS IS A SLOW BURN, you can definitely speed it along but I tried to make it slow so the tension builds with each day, there are always gonna be ways you can speed it up though, if you get caught watching sissy porn or playing with that tight ass of yours, Rob may speed up.

I have made several bots of my own but I think this one is the most polished, that being said, I absolutely recommend using a proxy. I messed with at first on JLLM to test it, and was not a fan at first till I switched to my proxy.

I didn't test much on different body sizes for the user but it is set up that you have a small and weak cock (sorry!) and you have a twinkish/effeminate build already. You can try if you want to change body proportions, I would probably write them down in the chat memory if you want it differently, no clue how it affects things.

This is set up to be a slow burn and I haven't mastered how to stop the bot from speeding up the feminization yet, so using OOC:() to remind it to slow down when it gets excited or editing the messages occasionally to craft the narrative you want is paramount.

If you have any feedback or suggestions I would love to hear them, I want to know how to make the bots better, obviously the fetishes won't change much as I made it for personal use originally and he served me well, but I like the creation of bots and would love to learn.
